---
format: html
title: build_temporal_trajectory_frame()
---

<html><head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.css">
<script type="text/javascript">
const macros = { "\\R": "\\textsf{R}", "\\mbox": "\\text", "\\code": "\\texttt"};
function processMathHTML() {
    var l = document.getElementsByClassName('reqn');
    for (let e of l) { katex.render(e.textContent, e, { throwOnError: false, macros }); }
    return;
}</script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.js"
    onload="processMathHTML();"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="R.css" />
</head><body><div class="container"><main>

<table style="width: 100%;"><tr><td>build_temporal_trajectory_frame</td><td style="text-align: right;">R Documentation</td></tr></table>

<h2>Build Temporal Trajectory Frame</h2>

<h3>Description</h3>

<p>Builds one animation frame for the temporal ANOVA component trajectory
stacked-area plot, optionally overlaying a modularity Q line.
</p>


<h3>Usage</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>build_temporal_trajectory_frame(
  data_plot,
  data_modularity,
  current_age,
  continent_label,
  vec_component_colours,
  colour_modularity,
  vec_palette = NULL,
  font_family = "VT323"
)
</code></pre>


<h3>Arguments</h3>

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td><code id="data_plot">data_plot</code></td>
<td>
<p>Tibble with columns 'age', 'component', and 'component_percentage'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="data_modularity">data_modularity</code></td>
<td>
<p>Tibble with columns 'age' and 'modularity_q'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="current_age">current_age</code></td>
<td>
<p>Numeric scalar. Age at which to draw the vertical marker line.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="continent_label">continent_label</code></td>
<td>
<p>Character scalar. Continent name used as the plot title.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="vec_component_colours">vec_component_colours</code></td>
<td>
<p>Named character vector mapping component names to fill colours.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="colour_modularity">colour_modularity</code></td>
<td>
<p>Character scalar. Colour for the modularity Q overlay line.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="vec_palette">vec_palette</code></td>
<td>
<p>Optional named character vector of ORACLE colours. If 'NULL',
colours are read with 'get_oracle_palette_values()'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="font_family">font_family</code></td>
<td>
<p>Character scalar. Font family for all text elements.</p>
</td></tr>
</table>


<h3>Value</h3>

<p>A 'ggplot' object ready for one animation frame.
</p>

</main>

</div>
</body></html>
